meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't monetize skills (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't monetize skills. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup (Beginner Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to monetize your coding skills. Learn the Claude Code setup workflow to build, ship, and launch your first AI-powered SaaS project today.
content.answer_block: Monetization fails when your code lacks real-world utility. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform from a tutorial-follower into a ship-fast engineer. This workflow automates the boilerplate, allowing you to focus on high-value business logic, ensuring your portfolio projects are production-ready and commercially viable from day one.
content.intro:
You have spent months grinding through tutorials, but your GitHub remains a graveyard of half-finished 'To-Do' apps that no one wants to pay for. The gap between knowing how to code and knowing how to build a product that solves a problem is wide, and it is the primary reason your skills aren't translating into income.

But the era of manual, slow development is dead. By mastering the Claude Code and Antigravity stack, you are no longer just writing lines; you are orchestrating an AI-driven development lifecycle. This is how you stop being a student and start becoming an AI Builder who ships value at the speed of thought.

steps.title: Environment Hardening
steps.description: Establish a robust development container that keeps your dependency tree clean and your production environment mirrored.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional SaaS boilerplate with TypeScript, Tailwind, and Supabase integration, ensuring strict type safety.

steps.title: Architecture Blueprinting
steps.description: Map your database schema and API routes before writing a single line of functional code to ensure scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational database schema for a subscription-based SaaS, including user auth, billing status, and project metadata.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on SaaS requirements'

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to handle repetitive CRUD operations so you can focus on core AI logic and unique selling points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a secure API endpoint for processing user-submitted data using the schema defined in step 2.

steps.title: Automated Testing Suites
steps.description: Never ship broken code. Use AI to generate comprehensive unit tests that prove your app works under load.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest unit tests for the core payment processing logic, covering edge cases like failed transactions and rate limits.

steps.title: Deployment & Monetization Hook
steps.description: Configure your production build pipelines to ensure your app is ready for users the second you deploy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated deployment to Vercel, including environment variable injection.

pro_tips: Always define your 'Definition of Done' in the system prompt before letting Claude write code to prevent feature creep.
Use Claude Code's 'review' command on your own code to find security vulnerabilities before pushing to production.
Map out your monetization strategy (e.g., Stripe integration) as the first feature, not the last, to validate your business model.
Treat your Antigravity prompts like technical specifications; the more detail you provide on constraints, the higher the quality.
Regularly audit your token usage in Claude Code to optimize how you interact with large codebases.
resources: Stripe API Docs for SaaS: https://stripe.com/docs/api
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, focus on building a landing page using the same Claude Code workflow to start capturing emails and validating your product idea.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools. You have the guide. Now you need to commit to the build. Stop waiting for the 'perfect' time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
